mapper.sql: id, device_code, software_pn, package_name, package_code, package_url, package_size, package_md5, package_desc, package_type, package_source, base_software_pn, package_adaptive_level, adaptive_assembly_pn, release_date, estimated_install_time, ota, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_software_package ( id, device_code, software_pn, package_name, package_code, package_url, package_size, package_md5, package_desc, package_type, package_source, base_software_pn, package_adaptive_level, adaptive_assembly_pn, release_date, estimated_install_time, ota, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{deviceCode}, #{softwarePn}, #{packageName}, #{packageCode}, #{packageUrl}, #{packageSize}, #{packageMd5}, #{packageDesc}, #{packageType}, #{packageSource}, #{baseSoftwarePn}, #{packageAdaptiveLevel}, #{adaptiveAssemblyPn}, #{releaseDate}, #{estimatedInstallTime}, #{ota}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_software_package ( id, device_code, software_pn, package_name, package_code, package_url, package_size, package_md5, package_desc, package_type, package_source, base_software_pn, package_adaptive_level, adaptive_assembly_pn, release_date, estimated_install_time, ota, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.deviceCode}, #{item.softwarePn}, #{item.packageName}, #{item.packageCode}, #{item.packageUrl}, #{item.packageSize}, #{item.packageMd5}, #{item.packageDesc}, #{item.packageType}, #{item.packageSource}, #{item.baseSoftwarePn}, #{item.packageAdaptiveLevel}, #{item.adaptiveAssemblyPn}, #{item.releaseDate}, #{item.estimatedInstallTime}, #{item.ota}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_software_package t SET
t.device_code = #{deviceCode},
t.software_pn = #{softwarePn},
t.package_name = #{packageName},
t.package_code = #{packageCode},
t.package_url = #{packageUrl},
t.package_size = #{packageSize},
t.package_md5 = #{packageMd5},
t.package_desc = #{packageDesc},
t.package_type = #{packageType},
t.package_source = #{packageSource},
t.base_software_pn = #{baseSoftwarePn},
t.package_adaptive_level = #{packageAdaptiveLevel},
t.adaptive_assembly_pn = #{adaptiveAssemblyPn},
t.release_date = #{releaseDate},
t.estimated_install_time = #{estimatedInstallTime},
t.ota = #{ota},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_software_package t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_software_package t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_software_package t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT FROM tb_software_package t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_software_package t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
